ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique stock symbol */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock in crore */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the company belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the company belongs */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the company went public */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* The company's official website */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock this price data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the reported prices */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the date */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the trading session */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading session */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "adjusted_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status (e.g., Open, Closed, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock this metric belongs to */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of period (e.g., Day, Week, Month, Year) */,
  "high_low_percentage" REAL /* High/low percentage change over the period */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume during the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "average_daily_volume" INTEGER /* Average trading volume during the period */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Absolute change in price over the period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock price during the period */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock, indicating its volatility relative to the market */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value of the stock, indicating its performance relative to the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's account status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for alerts, notifications, and dashboard settings */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
